offer: For construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent payment status reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual tracking and reporting.
problem: Inconsistent payment status reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project accountants
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project accountants with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual entry and customizable report templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for the first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing payment data
